name: viewer
description: Time-series 3D point dataset viewer. Increment 1: render frame 0 of a synthetic dataset in a CSP-safe webview.

molaro.assistant.model.description: Anthropic model the analysis assistant uses.

molaro.assistant.useStub.description: Use the scripted stub backend instead of the real Claude Agent SDK assistant (no network, no API key). For development and the test suite.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.package: rm -rf dist && npm run build && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package -o viewer-0.1.0.vsix
scripts.test: node --test tests/contract.test.ts tests/geometry.test.ts tests/framing.test.ts tests/playback.test.ts tests/producer_protocol.test.ts tests/classification.test.ts tests/picking.test.ts tests/sets.test.ts tests/address.test.ts tests/commands.test.ts tests/recipes.test.ts tests/claude.test.ts tests/plot.test.ts tests/claudelayout.test.ts tests/prompt.test.ts tests/claudebackend.test.ts tests/tool_surface.test.ts tests/get_context.test.ts tests/hostmessages.test.ts
